query:
-- Look for Xero billing items for the 6 affected customers (Albany, Aspley, Ausdocs, Kawana, Mt Cotton, Stafford Heights)
-- These would be the actual retail invoices showing what SmileTel charges the customer
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.invoiceDate,
  bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0009','C0016','C0022','C0132','C0166','C0229')
  AND bi.billingPlatform = 'Xero'
  AND (
    bi.description LIKE '%SIP%'
    OR bi.description LIKE '%Channel%'
    OR bi.description LIKE '%Voice%'
    OR bi.description LIKE '%PBX%'
    OR bi.description LIKE '%Phone%'
  )
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.lineAmount DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Look for Xero billing items for the 6 affected customers (Albany, Aspley, Ausdocs, Kawana, Mt Cotton, Stafford Heights)
-- These would be the actual retail invoices showing what SmileTel charges the customer
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.invoiceDate,
  bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0009','C0016','C0022','C0132','C0166','C0229')
  AND bi.billingPlatform = 'Xero'
  AND (
    bi.description LIKE '%SIP%'
    OR bi.description LIKE '%Channel%'
    OR bi.description LIKE '%Voice%'
    OR bi.description LIKE '%PBX%'
    OR bi.description LIKE '%Phone%'
  )
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.lineAmount DESC;
